configurations.name: Pebble Deploy (Emery)
configurations.command: wsl bash -lc 'cd /mnt/q/ASLWatchFace && pebble install --emulator emery && pebble logs --emulator emery'

configurations.name: Pebble Settings (Clay, Emery)
configurations.command: wsl bash -lc 'cd /mnt/q/ASLWatchFace && for i in {1..15}; do pebble emu-app-config --emulator emery && exit 0; echo waiting-for-pkjs; sleep 1; done; echo failed-to-open-settings; exit 1'
